violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the women's toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the women's toilet room was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

Chemicals was stored with single service items on basement storage shelf. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies in the kitchen and basement storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control service unknown. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The cooking utensils stored on an unclean surface (edge of prep unit) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
Water observed in stacked containers on the clean storage rack. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
Vegetable chopper in basement storage area was not in good repair. Vegetable chopper must be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The hand dryer in the women's toilet room was not in good repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The area around the dumpster and oil recycling receptacle has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and vegetation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The floors especially on the basement stairs and in the basement storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The walk in cooler fan covers, soffit, and ceiling have an accumulation of dust, mold, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

Food containers being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
One light was nonfunctional above the flattop grill. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored on top of food containers in the food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese, sour cream) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the front food prep area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

Avocados were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

Single service bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredient (hot line area). Spoons used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients observed with the handles in the food. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in food prep and basement storage areas. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
Gloves observed being used for more than one task. Gloves must be changed between tasks. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
One light was nonfunctional above the flattop grill. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
Two areas of wall and floor junctures in basement are in poor repair. Minor rain water observed pooling on floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2024
Hand washing sink in the men's toilet room is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
Splash guards are need on the side of the mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
Cutting board at the steam table has exposed hardware. Surfaces must be smooth and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023

The condensate pipe from the walk in refrigeration unit comes out of the walk in cooler approximately 4 feet above the mop sink.. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, oil drums, old construction material, etc. Dumpster areas must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement, and dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The area outside the back door has an accumulation of litter and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
